title: Start Draw
helpClubSep: Random order with club separation — no runners from the same club start consecutively
helpSeeded: Seeded draw — ranked runners start later in each class
helpSimultaneous: Mass start — all runners in the class start at the same time
dragToReorder: Drag class bars to reorder within or across corridors
drawCompleteDetail: {{count}} runner(s) assigned start times. The start list has been updated.
helpRandomHint: Same club may end up adjacent
helpClubSepDesc: Runners from the same club are spread apart
helpSeededDesc: Top-ranked runners get later (better) start times
helpSimultaneousDesc: All runners start at the same time (mass start)
corridorTooltipDesc: Classes are assigned to parallel start corridors. Within a corridor, classes start one after another. More corridors = shorter total start window.
overlapTooltipDesc: When enabled, classes whose courses share the same opening controls are placed in the same corridor so their runners start sequentially, never at the same time. This prevents runners from following each other through shared controls.
